basic_details.short_information: Central Agricultural University (CAU) has released the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification for 1 Project Assistant post on a project-based basis. Candidates below 35 years of age with an M.Sc. in Horticulture, Agriculture, Fruit Science, or Genetics & Plant Breeding are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Project Assistant: Below 35 years. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Horticulture/ Agriculture/ Fruit Science/ Genetics & Plant Breeding
qualification.details: Project Assistant: M.Sc. in Horticulture/Agriculture/Fruit Science/Genetics & Plant Breeding. Desirable: Experience in field survey, germplasm collection and characterization of horticultural crops; experience in nursery management and propagation techniques of fruit crops; good documentation, report writing and communication skills.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant: Consolidated emoluments of ₹25,000/- per month

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CAU Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CAU Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.central_agricultural_university_cau: M.Sc. in Horticulture/ Agriculture/ Fruit Science/ Genetics & Plant Breeding

content_sections.heading: CAU Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CAU Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: M.Sc. in Horticulture/Agriculture/Fruit Science/Genetics & Plant Breeding. Desirable: Experience in field survey, germplasm collection and characterization of horticultural crops; experience in nursery management and propagation techniques of fruit crops; good documentation, report writing and communication skills.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Below 35 years. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC as per Govt. of India norms.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Consolidated emoluments of ₹25,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: CAU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CAU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CAU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Assistant at the Central Agricultural University (CAU).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Horticulture, Agriculture, Fruit Science, or Genetics & Plant Breeding.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The age limit is below 35 years, with relaxation provided for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The consolidated emoluments offered are ₹25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 28th July 2026, starting at 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue is located in Bermiok, Sikkim, with pincode 737134.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their application, biodata, photograph, original certificates, mark sheets, and photocopies of all relevant documents, along with a valid photo identity proof.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
